name: SIMPAR S.A.
summary: SIMPAR S.A., through its subsidiaries, provides road logistics services in Brazil. Its services include road cargo transport services, dedicated road cargo logistics, commodity logistics, warehousing services, urban distribution, internal logistics, and chartering. The company is also involved in the rental and sale of trucks, machinery, and equipment; and provision of leasing, freight payment, and financial services, as well as light vehicle rental and fleet management services. In addition, it offers fleet management and outsourcing services; and operates a total of 14 car dealership stores selling Volkswagen, FIAT, and Ford brands located in the state of S√É¬£o Paulo. The company was founded in 1956 and is based in S√É¬£o Paulo, Brazil. SIMPAR S.A operates as a subsidiary of JSP Holding S.A.
